Solutions

Task 6: Customers with missing phone but email present
SQL Query:
SELECT * FROM customers WHERE contact_number IS NULL AND email IS NOT NULL

Run times: [0.009124200034420937, 0.005153200007043779, 0.004879300016909838, 0.005295499984640628, 0.005776100035291165, 0.004966000036802143, 0.005145000002812594, 0.005014299997128546, 0.004999500000849366, 0.00516790000256151]

Average: 0.005552100011846051

MongoDB Query:
db.customers.find({"contact_number" : None, "email" : {"$exists" : True,"$ne": None}})

Run times: [5.360000068321824e-05, 0.00020210002548992634, 9.740004315972328e-05, 0.00012310000602155924, 6.970000686123967e-05, 6.310001481324434e-05, 4.549999721348286e-05, 0.00011989998165518045, 4.509999416768551e-05, 4.499999340623617e-05]

Average: 8.645000634714961e-05

Task 7: Delete sessions with no moods recorded
SQL Query:
DELETE FROM watch_sessions_temp WHERE mood1 IS NULL AND mood2 IS NULL

Run times: [0.21377139998367056, 0.17767890001414344, 0.22532279998995364, 0.1623453000211157, 0.18061470001703128, 0.21962719998555258, 0.20519269997021183, 0.22001649998128414, 0.16842579998774454, 0.1917074999655597]

Average: 0.19647027999162675

MongoDB Query:
db.watch_sessions_temp.delete_many({"$or": [{"moods" : None}, {"moods" : []}, {"moods" : {"$exists" : False}}]})

Run times: [5.360000068321824e-05, 0.00020210002548992634, 9.740004315972328e-05, 0.00012310000602155924, 6.970000686123967e-05, 6.310001481324434e-05, 4.549999721348286e-05, 0.00011989998165518045, 4.509999416768551e-05, 4.499999340623617e-05]

Average: 0.11815495000919327

Task 8: Distinct watch dates
SQL Query:
SELECT DISTINCT watch_date FROM watch_sessions

Run times: [0.11001819994999096, 0.03779989999020472, 0.03382630000123754, 0.036863200017251074, 0.031970699958037585, 0.035345799988135695, 0.03314240003237501, 0.031107200018595904, 0.0344261999707669, 0.03377059998456389]

Average: 0.04182704999111593

MongoDB Query:
db.watch_sessions.distinct("watch_date")

Run times: [0.18841649999376386, 0.08140530000673607, 0.07929790002526715, 0.0760827999911271, 0.07148849999066442, 0.07207400002516806, 0.07422080001560971, 0.06606499996269122, 0.06355899997288361, 0.06904020003275946]

Average: 0.08416500000166707

Task 9: Delete customers over 60 with no email
Task 10: Sessions with excited but not bored
SQL Query:
SELECT * FROM watch_sessions WHERE (mood1 = "excited" OR mood2 = "excited") AND mood1 != "bored" AND mood2 != "bored"

Run times: [0.19476340000983328, 0.18163980002282187, 0.18340629996964708, 0.1861417000181973, 0.18395500001497567, 0.18196390004595742, 0.1952515000011772, 0.18067060003522784, 0.17998270003590733, 0.18110330001218244]

Average: 0.18488782001659274

MongoDB Query:
db.watch_sessions.find({"moods" : {"$in" : ["excited"], "$nin" : ["bored"]}})

Run times: [6.65000407025218e-05, 0.00011339999036863446, 0.00011000002268701792, 5.9500045608729124e-05, 6.059999577701092e-05, 7.840001489967108e-05, 6.609997944906354e-05, 6.839999696239829e-05, 5.289999535307288e-05, 5.4299947805702686e-05]

Average: 7.301000296138227e-05
